category_sources: Official GitHub README describes httpflow as a command-line utility to capture and dump HTTP streams.
source_facts.description says httpflow is a packet capture and analysis utility similar to tcpdump for HTTP.
docs_sources: Official source_facts.homepage/source_facts.repo is the GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/six-ddc/httpflow; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include http, traffic-analysis, capture, pcap-files, and tcpdump.
source_facts.description mentions packet capture, analysis, tcpdump, and HTTP.
